'''âdh-ch-r-y''' ('''kadhachreyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:woundfuck|woundfuck]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ch-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woundfuck|woundfuck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-ch-r-y
|-
! Lemma
| kadhachreyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhachreyoko|thidhachreyoko]] || [[word:jidhachreyoko|jidhachreyoko]] || [[word:shidhachreyoko|shidhachreyoko]] || [[word:kidhachreyoko|kidhachreyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhachreyoko|thuthudhachreyoko]] || [[word:jujudhachreyoko|jujudhachreyoko]] || [[word:shushudhachreyoko|shushudhachreyoko]] || [[word:kukudhachreyoko|kukudhachreyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhachreyoko|thudhachreyoko]] || [[word:judhachreyoko|judhachreyoko]] || [[word:shudhachreyoko|shudhachreyoko]] || [[word:kudhachreyoko|kudhachreyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhachreyoko|thodhachreyoko]] || [[word:jodhachreyoko|jodhachreyoko]] || [[word:shodhachreyoko|shodhachreyoko]] || [[word:kodhachreyoko|kodhachreyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhachreyoko|thodhachreyoko]] || [[word:jodhachreyoko|jodhachreyoko]] || [[word:shodhachreyoko|shodhachreyoko]] || [[word:kodhachreyoko|kodhachreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhachreyoko|thĂŠdhachreyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhachreyoko|jĂŠdhachreyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhachreyoko|shĂŠdhachreyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhachreyoko|kĂŠdhachreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhachreyoko|thathadhachreyoko]] || [[word:jajadhachreyoko|jajadhachreyoko]] || [[word:shashadhachreyoko|shashadhachreyoko]] || [[word:kakadhachreyoko|kakadhachreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhachreyoko|thadhachreyoko]] || [[word:jadhachreyoko|jadhachreyoko]] || [[word:shadhachreyoko|shadhachreyoko]] || [[word:kadhachreyoko|kadhachreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhachreyoko|thadhachreyoko]] || [[word:jadhachreyoko|jadhachreyoko]] || [[word:shadhachreyoko|shadhachreyoko]] || [[word:kadhachreyoko|kadhachreyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
